    # Handle other subjects (create relationships) - ensure ALL triples are processed
    for other_subj in other_subjects:
        for triple in subject_triples[other_subj]:
            p = triple.predicate
            o = triple.object
            processed_triples.add(id(triple))
            
            if p == "capital" and main_subject in o:
                main_clause += f", where {other_subj} is the capital"
            elif p == "country" and main_subject == o:
                main_clause += f", which is in {other_subj}"
            elif p == "cityServed":
                main_clause += f", serving {other_subj}"
            elif p == "location" and other_subj == main_subject:
                main_clause += f" in {o}"
            elif p == "established" or p == "foundingDate":
                main_clause += f", established {o}"
            elif p == "inaugurationDate":
                main_clause += f", inaugurated {o}"
            elif p == "dedicatedTo":
                main_clause += f", dedicated to {o}"
            elif p == "designer":
                main_clause += f", designed by {o}"
            elif p == "material":
                main_clause += f", made of {o}"

    return main_clause + "."
